revision.comment: magic word for PAGESINCATEGORY rather than template
revision.text:
{{#ifexist: Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia | {{{2}}} [[:Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|{{{3}}}]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}} | }} __NOTOC__ Display one topic table row, for given language name, topic code, and topic name. == Usage == {{tlc|EL table row/topic|''Language Name''|''topic code''|''topic name''}} == Parameters == There are three positional parameters, all required: * {{para|1}} ⟶ language name (e.g., ''French'', ''Croatian'', etc.) * {{para|2}} ⟶ topic code{{snd}}any of: ''bio'', ''cult'', ''geo'', ''gov'', ''hist'', ''mil'', ''sci'', ''sport'', ''struct'', ''tech'', or ''transp''. * {{para|3}} ⟶ topic name{{snd}}expansion of topic code; e.g., ''bio'' ⇨ "Biography"; ''gov'' ⇨ "Government and politics" == Examples == These examples are embedded in minimal table markup in order to demonstrate the appearance of the row in a table context: * {{tlc|EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}}
* {{tlc|EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}}
== Note on expensive parser functions == This template uses one [[WP:EXPENSIVE|expensive parser function call]].

revision.comment: magic word for PAGESINCATEGORY rather than template
revision.text:
{{#ifexist: Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia | {{{2}}} [[:Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|{{{3}}}]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}} | }} __NOTOC__ Display one topic table row, for given language name, topic code, and topic name. == Usage == {{tlc|EL table row/topic|''Language Name''|''topic code''|''topic name''}} == Parameters == There are three positional parameters, all required: * {{para|1}} ⟶ language name (e.g., ''French'', ''Croatian'', etc.) * {{para|2}} ⟶ topic code{{snd}}any of: ''bio'', ''cult'', ''geo'', ''gov'', ''hist'', ''mil'', ''sci'', ''sport'', ''struct'', ''tech'', or ''transp''. * {{para|3}} ⟶ topic name{{snd}}expansion of topic code; e.g., ''bio'' ⇨ "Biography"; ''gov'' ⇨ "Government and politics" == Examples == These examples are embedded in minimal table markup in order to demonstrate the appearance of the row in a table context: * {{tlc|EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}}
* {{tlc|EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}}
== Note on expensive parser functions == This template uses one [[WP:EXPENSIVE|expensive parser function call]].

{{#ifexist: Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia | {{{2}}} [[:Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|{{{3}}}]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}} | }} __NOTOC__ Display one topic table row, for given language name, topic code, and topic name. == Usage == {{tlc|EL table row/topic|''Language Name''|''topic code''|''topic name''}} == Parameters == There are three positional parameters, all required: * {{para|1}} ⟶ language name (e.g., ''French'', ''Croatian'', etc.) * {{para|2}} ⟶ topic code{{snd}}any of: ''bio'', ''cult'', ''geo'', ''gov'', ''hist'', ''mil'', ''sci'', ''sport'', ''struct'', ''tech'', or ''transp''. * {{para|3}} ⟶ topic name{{snd}}expansion of topic code; e.g., ''bio'' ⇨ "Biography"; ''gov'' ⇨ "Government and politics" == Examples == These examples are embedded in minimal table markup in order to demonstrate the appearance of the row in a table context: * {{tlc|EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}}
* {{tlc|EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}}
== Note on expensive parser functions == This template uses one [[WP:EXPENSIVE|expensive parser function call]].

{{#ifexist: Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia | {{{2}}} [[:Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|{{{3}}}]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}} | }} __NOTOC__ Display one topic table row, for given language name, topic code, and topic name. == Usage == {{tlc|EL table row/topic|''Language Name''|''topic code''|''topic name''}} == Parameters == There are three positional parameters, all required: * {{para|1}} ⟶ language name (e.g., ''French'', ''Croatian'', etc.) * {{para|2}} ⟶ topic code{{snd}}any of: ''bio'', ''cult'', ''geo'', ''gov'', ''hist'', ''mil'', ''sci'', ''sport'', ''struct'', ''tech'', or ''transp''. * {{para|3}} ⟶ topic name{{snd}}expansion of topic code; e.g., ''bio'' ⇨ "Biography"; ''gov'' ⇨ "Government and politics" == Examples == These examples are embedded in minimal table markup in order to demonstrate the appearance of the row in a table context: * {{tlc|EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}}
* {{tlc|EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}}
== Note on expensive parser functions == This template uses one [[WP:EXPENSIVE|expensive parser function call]].

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{#ifexist: Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia | {{{2}}} [[:Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|{{{3}}}]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}} | }} __NOTOC__ Display one topic table row, for given language name, topic code, and topic name. == Usage == {{tlc|EL table row/topic|''Language Name''|''topic code''|''topic name''}} == Parameters == There are three positional parameters, all required: * {{para|1}} ⟶ language name (e.g., ''French'', ''Croatian'', etc.) * {{para|2}} ⟶ topic code{{snd}}any of: ''bio'', ''cult'', ''geo'', ''gov'', ''hist'', ''mil'', ''sci'', ''sport'', ''struct'', ''tech'', or ''transp''. * {{para|3}} ⟶ topic name{{snd}}expansion of topic code; e.g., ''bio'' ⇨ "Biography"; ''gov'' ⇨ "Government and politics" == Examples == These examples are embedded in minimal table markup in order to demonstrate the appearance of the row in a table context: * {{tlc|EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}}
* {{tlc|EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}}
== Note on expensive parser functions == This template uses one [[WP:EXPENSIVE|expensive parser function call]]. [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{#ifexist: Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia | {{{2}}} [[:Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|{{{3}}}]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}} | }} __NOTOC__ Display one topic table row, for given language name, topic code, and topic name. == Usage == {{tlc|EL table row/topic|''Language Name''|''topic code''|''topic name''}} == Parameters == There are three positional parameters, all required: * {{para|1}} ⟶ language name (e.g., ''French'', ''Croatian'', etc.) * {{para|2}} ⟶ topic code{{snd}}any of: ''bio'', ''cult'', ''geo'', ''gov'', ''hist'', ''mil'', ''sci'', ''sport'', ''struct'', ''tech'', or ''transp''. * {{para|3}} ⟶ topic name{{snd}}expansion of topic code; e.g., ''bio'' ⇨ "Biography"; ''gov'' ⇨ "Government and politics" == Examples == These examples are embedded in minimal table markup in order to demonstrate the appearance of the row in a table context: * {{tlc|EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}}
* {{tlc|EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}}
== Note on expensive parser functions == This template uses one [[WP:EXPENSIVE|expensive parser function call]].

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{#ifexist: Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia | {{{2}}} [[:Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|{{{3}}}]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}} | }} __NOTOC__ Display one topic table row, for given language name, topic code, and topic name. == Usage == {{tlc|EL table row/topic|''Language Name''|''topic code''|''topic name''}} == Parameters == There are three positional parameters, all required: * {{para|1}} ⟶ language name (e.g., ''French'', ''Croatian'', etc.) * {{para|2}} ⟶ topic code{{snd}}any of: ''bio'', ''cult'', ''geo'', ''gov'', ''hist'', ''mil'', ''sci'', ''sport'', ''struct'', ''tech'', or ''transp''. * {{para|3}} ⟶ topic name{{snd}}expansion of topic code; e.g., ''bio'' ⇨ "Biography"; ''gov'' ⇨ "Government and politics" == Examples == These examples are embedded in minimal table markup in order to demonstrate the appearance of the row in a table context: * {{tlc|EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}}
* {{tlc|EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}}
== Note on expensive parser functions == This template uses one [[WP:EXPENSIVE|expensive parser function call]]. [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#ifexist: Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia | {{{2}}} [[:Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|{{{3}}}]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}} | }} __NOTOC__ Display one topic table row, for given language name, topic code, and topic name. == Usage == {{tlc|EL table row/topic|''Language Name''|''topic code''|''topic name''}} == Parameters == There are three positional parameters, all required: * {{para|1}} ⟶ language name (e.g., ''French'', ''Croatian'', etc.) * {{para|2}} ⟶ topic code{{snd}}any of: ''bio'', ''cult'', ''geo'', ''gov'', ''hist'', ''mil'', ''sci'', ''sport'', ''struct'', ''tech'', or ''transp''. * {{para|3}} ⟶ topic name{{snd}}expansion of topic code; e.g., ''bio'' ⇨ "Biography"; ''gov'' ⇨ "Government and politics" == Examples == These examples are embedded in minimal table markup in order to demonstrate the appearance of the row in a table context: * {{tlc|EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}}
* {{tlc|EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}}
== Note on expensive parser functions == This template uses one [[WP:EXPENSIVE|expensive parser function call]]. [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{#ifexist: Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia | {{{2}}} [[:Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|{{{3}}}]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}} | }} __NOTOC__ Display one topic table row, for given language name, topic code, and topic name. == Usage == {{tlc|EL table row/topic|''Language Name''|''topic code''|''topic name''}} == Parameters == There are three positional parameters, all required: * {{para|1}} ⟶ language name (e.g., ''French'', ''Croatian'', etc.) * {{para|2}} ⟶ topic code{{snd}}any of: ''bio'', ''cult'', ''geo'', ''gov'', ''hist'', ''mil'', ''sci'', ''sport'', ''struct'', ''tech'', or ''transp''. * {{para|3}} ⟶ topic name{{snd}}expansion of topic code; e.g., ''bio'' ⇨ "Biography"; ''gov'' ⇨ "Government and politics" == Examples == These examples are embedded in minimal table markup in order to demonstrate the appearance of the row in a table context: * {{tlc|EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}}
* {{tlc|EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}}
== Note on expensive parser functions == This template uses one [[WP:EXPENSIVE|expensive parser function call]]. [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=EL_table_row%2Ftopic here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#ifexist: Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia | {{{2}}} [[:Category:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|{{{3}}}]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{{3}}} articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}} | }} __NOTOC__ Display one topic table row, for given language name, topic code, and topic name. == Usage == {{tlc|EL table row/topic|''Language Name''|''topic code''|''topic name''}} == Parameters == There are three positional parameters, all required: * {{para|1}} ⟶ language name (e.g., ''French'', ''Croatian'', etc.) * {{para|2}} ⟶ topic code{{snd}}any of: ''bio'', ''cult'', ''geo'', ''gov'', ''hist'', ''mil'', ''sci'', ''sport'', ''struct'', ''tech'', or ''transp''. * {{para|3}} ⟶ topic name{{snd}}expansion of topic code; e.g., ''bio'' ⇨ "Biography"; ''gov'' ⇨ "Government and politics" == Examples == These examples are embedded in minimal table markup in order to demonstrate the appearance of the row in a table context: * {{tlc|EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|French|mil|Military}}
* {{tlc|EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}} ⟶ {{EL table row/topic|German|gov|Government and politics}}
== Note on expensive parser functions == This template uses one [[WP:EXPENSIVE|expensive parser function call]]. [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
